subject: [PATCH 1/2] nfsd: defer setting NFSD4_CALLBACK_RUNNING in deleg_reaper

2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFS daemon where the NFSD4_CALLBACK_RUNNING bit is set too early, preventing recall-any dispatch for affected clients. The fix involves moving the test_and_set_bit() operation to after checking the rate limit and callback state gates. This ensures that the bit is only taken when nfsd4_run_cb() will be called.
